title: HSTRLEN
description: Returns the length of the value of a field.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns the string length of the value associated with `field` in the hash stored at `key`. If the `key` or the `field` do not exist, 0 is returned. ## Examples HSET myhash f1 HelloWorld f2 99 f3 -256 HSTRLEN myhash f1 HSTRLEN myhash f2 HSTRLEN myhash f3 ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the string length of the value associated with the _field_, or zero when the _field_ isn't present in the hash or the _key_ doesn't exist at all. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the string length of the value associated with the _field_, or zero when the _field_ isn't present in the hash or the _key_ doesn't exist at all.
intro: Returns the string length of the value associated with `field` in the hash stored at `key`. If the `key` or the `field` do not exist, 0 is returned.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Returns the string length of the value associated with `field` in the hash stored at `key`. If the `key` or the `field` do not exist, 0 is returned.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
HSET myhash f1 HelloWorld f2 99 f3 -256
HSTRLEN myhash f1
HSTRLEN myhash f2
HSTRLEN myhash f3

| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the string length of the value associated with the _field_, or zero when the _field_ isn't present in the hash or the _key_ doesn't exist at all.

**RESP3:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the string length of the value associated with the _field_, or zero when the _field_ isn't present in the hash or the _key_ doesn't exist at all.
